pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh as the URLs to inject into the bookmarks JSON file, and strictly checked for absence by verifier.py.
Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly require these 3 exact folder names to be created in the Chrome bookmarks.
Task instructions map directly to these standard Chrome flag identifiers and values (1=Enabled, 2=Disabled) which are verified against the Local State JSON.
Task instructions explicitly state the keyword 'buoy', which is explicitly checked by the verifier SQLite database query.
Task instructions provide the target URL 'https://www.ndbc.noaa.gov/station_page.php?station=%s', matching this string literal checked in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Chrome bookmarks seeded via setup_task.sh. It is verified that the streaming domains to be purged exactly match the 8 injected entertainment URLs. The required bookmark folder names ('Weather & Tides', 'Port & Coast Guard', 'Vessel Operations'), search keyword ('buoy'), search URL pattern ('ndbc.noaa.gov'), and standard Chrome flag identifiers ('show-saved-copy@1', 'back-forward-cache@1', 'enable-quic@2') all precisely match the explicit task description instructions and verifier logic.
